TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chris_Hipkins, title = Chris_Hipkins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chris_Hipkins} }

S.FORM: Chris Hipkins Chris Hipkins (ryax sa 5 na byacing tay 9 squ kawas na 1978 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1978) mrhuw New zealand ta' misuw hya' ga Chris Hipkins, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Chris Hipkins minkahul sa Wellington na New zealand. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1978 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 各國領導人列表 canpyuta hknyun

Chris Hipkins Chris Hipkins (ryax sa 5 na byacing tay 9 squ kawas na 1978 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1978) mrhuw New zealand ta' misuw hya' ga Chris Hipkins, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Chris Hipkins minkahul sa Wellington na New zealand. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1978 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 各國領導人列表 canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ħipkins~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ħipkins~ɕ (rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw new zealan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ħipkins~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ħipkins~ɕ minkaħul s~ɕa welliŋton na new zealan*. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ******* ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
